system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee with Spear
Type: Counter
Qi: 3

You effortlessly evade and flow with the Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms Technique. Moving with the attacker you rise on one foot after their final backswing and thrust out your spear in a single arm to impale them. Make a melee Skill roll against the Attack roll of your opponent. On a Success you counter the Attack doing Damage as described below. If this counter is used against the Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms, you gain +1d10 per Rank of Waijia to your Skill roll. Created by the Fearless Rival of Dai Bien, Fearless Reply of the Spear was developed to counter The Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms Technique used by Mystic Sword sect. This can be used as a standard counter for any sword Attack, in which case you do normal Damage for your weapon. If used against Slicing Blades of the Flying Phantoms you do 2 Extra Wounds against the attacker. Cathartic: Against normal Sword Attacks you do 2 Extra Wounds, against the Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms you do 4 Extra Wounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.accessNotes: Created by the Fearless Rival of Dai Bien, Fearless Reply of the Spear was developed to counter The Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms Technique used by Mystic Sword sect.
system.catharticEffect: Against normal Sword Attacks you do 2 Extra Wounds, against the Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms you do 4 Extra Wounds.
